headline: Datadog for Government Achieves FedRAMP® High Certification
summary: The certification strengthens Datadog’s commitment and ability to meet the unique needs of federal organizationsNEW YORK, May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ: DDOG), the monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, today announced it has achieved FedRAMP (Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program) High certification, which signifies Datadog’s ability to meet one of the federal government’s most stringent cloud security and compliance standards.
